# secret (Ephemeral Resource)

Decrypts an AES-256-GCM encrypted value on-the-fly. The plaintext is ephemeral and never written to state or plan.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ciphertext` (String) The 'SECRET1;...' encrypted value. Safe to commit to your repository.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Free-form note describing what this secret is for. Purely informational; does not affect decryption.
- `secret_key` (String) Name of the environment variable that holds the passphrase for this secret (e.g. "SECRET_KEY", "PROD_SECRET_KEY", or "TF_VAR_app_key"). Defaults to "SECRET_KEY" if omitted.

### Read-Only

- `plaintext` (String, Sensitive) The decrypted value. Only available during plan/apply; never persisted.
